response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with strong TypeScript and cloud infrastructure skills, he lacks the required 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions. His exposure to AI, agents, and MCP appears very recent, and his resume completely omits Python, a core technology required for the data pipelines and AI systems in this role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a proven track record at the Staff level.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure including AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
Recent relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions.
No mention of Python, which is a required language and standard for AI and data pipelines.
Lacks explicit experience with Vector Databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation frameworks.
